input.title: Amazon and Google deepen cloud partnership for retail AI
input.content: Amazon.com Inc (AMZN) and Alphabet Inc's Google Cloud (GOOGL) announced a multi-year collaboration to integrate retail AI tooling. Financial terms were not disclosed. Analysts called it strategically notable but not a transformational earnings event this quarter.

mockModelResponse.headline: Amazon and Google expand retail AI cloud tie-up
mockModelResponse.summary: AMZN and GOOGL announced a multi-year cloud collaboration for retail AI. Terms were undisclosed; impact looks notable but not an immediate earnings catalyst.
